Coast
Classic

San Luis Obispo, California  ·  Fall 2025

JV · Aug 21–22
Varsity · Sept 4–5
Register Your Team ↗
About the Tournament

The Central Coast Classic brings together competitive girls water polo programs for strong Varsity and JV tournaments at San Luis Obispo High School. Escape the late summer heat, just minutes from the ocean, with match-play and championship tournaments, awards, and an unforgettable Central Coast experience with your team!

📍
Venue
San Luis Obispo High School
1499 San Luis Dr, SLO CA 93401
View on Google Maps ↗
🏊
Divisions
Varsity & Junior Varsity
One weekend each division

Tournament Divisions

Varsity & JV Divisions

Varsity Division

$550 / team
📅  September 4 – 5, 2025
  • Match-play tournament — know your schedule & opponents ahead of time
  • Special schedule/opponent requests honored
  • 4 guaranteed games
  • 25 meter course
  • 7-minute quarters
  • 2 full timeouts per team
Register Varsity Team ↗

JV Division

$450 / team
📅  August 21 – 22, 2025
  • Championship tournament — bracket play to crown a champion
  • 4 guaranteed games
  • 25 meter course
  • 6-minute quarters
  • 1 full timeout & 1 thirty-second timeout
Awards
🥇 1st Place Medals  ·  🥈 2nd Place Medals  ·  🥉 3rd Place Medals
Register JV Team ↗

For Teams & Families

Events & Activities

San Luis Obispo is one of California's most beloved destinations. While you're here, make the most of everything the Central Coast has to offer for your team and families.

Avila Beach
Sunset Magazine's award-winning beach just 15 minutes from SLOHS. Perfect for team downtime between sessions.
↗
Avila Valley Barn
Fresh local produce, homemade pies, farm animals, and the famous Smoke House BBQ — a true Central Coast stop.
↗
Avila Beach Farmers Market
Local produce, artisan foods, live music, and ocean views every week.
↗
Battle Axe
8 indoor axe throwing lanes in the heart of downtown SLO — the ultimate team-building activity.
↗
Bob Jones Trail
Paved "City to the Sea" bike and walking trail from Hwy 101 all the way to Avila Beach.
↗
Concerts in the Plaza
The largest free concert series on the Central Coast, hosted in the heart of downtown SLO.
↗
Creamery District
Hidden gem in downtown SLO — murals, eateries, boutiques in a historic 1910 creamery building.
↗
Mersea's at Harford Pier
Fresh seafood with stunning ocean views on the pier in Avila Beach. Dine inside or out.
↗
Mustang Lanes — Cal Poly
10-lane bowling alley on the Cal Poly campus featuring cosmic bowl, arcade games, and pool tables.
↗
Puzzle Effect Escape Room
Downtown SLO's go-to team-building escape room. Call 805-250-4839 or email [email protected].
↗
Downtown Centre Cinema
7-screen theater with reclining seats — the oldest theatre company in the Western US since 1918.
↗
SLO Public Market
Many food options to sample and enjoy the best of the Central Coast. Great for the whole squad.
↗
SLO Ranch Market
Lively open-air courtyard with diverse restaurants and shops — something for everyone on your team.
↗
